notes:
Review confidence: 10% chance of missed bug.
Least confident areas: (1) Whether sign_sync TOCTOU on try_current() could race in a shutdown scenario, (2) whether p256::ecdsa::Signature::from_slice accepts DER in addition to fixed r||s.
Would raise confidence if: integration tests exercised all three algorithm paths against real backends (currently only ed25519 has one).
title: Review: secretx-signature 2025-06-16
